title: Finding salvage value using the depreciation formula
problem: A refrigerator is purchased for $\$5000$ and depreciates at $20\%$ per year. Find its salvage value after $3$ years.

steps.instruction: Write the depreciation formula and identify the values.
Substitute the values into the formula.
Multiply to find the salvage value.

title: Finding the original purchase price given the salvage value
problem: After $4$ years of depreciating at $20\%$ per year, a printer is worth $\$4096$. Find its original purchase price.

steps.instruction: Write the depreciation formula and rearrange to make $V_0$ the subject.
Divide to find the original purchase price.

title: Finding the number of years to reach a value threshold
problem: A car is purchased for $\$20\,000$ and depreciates at $10\%$ per year. Find the number of complete years until its value first falls below $\$13\,000$.

steps.instruction: Write the inequality to solve, then plan to try consecutive integer values of $n$.

steps.working: The value first falls below $\$13\,000$ after $5$ complete years.
